label: exam
narrative: Four past-exam questions on AI/neural-network/GPS topics. All jp stems and choices match ocr/page_157.md verbatim. Markers correctly use ア/イ/ウ/エ in jp and A/B/C/D in zh/en. Answer indices align with the answer-key footer (4-11 エ→3, 4-12 ウ→2, 4-13 ア→0, 4-14 ウ→2). zh and en translations faithful with parenthetical English expansions for acronyms (AR/CRM/ERP/CDN/SAN).
